changelog: Rating widget now works on Docker / read-only web folders: injected into the web client in memory (no disk write), file-based injection kept for native. Plus multi-user two-way sync (one shared key, routed by Jellyfin user id; leave username empty to sync all users).
description: Two-way sync of watched, rating and favourite (movies & series) with the Jellyboxd app, for every user.
name: Jellyboxd Sync
overview: Keep watched / rating / favourite in sync with Jellyboxd.
